text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...It appears I have to take it easy for a while.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
choice_data_list: Injuries are inevitable! You'll get used to it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, of course. I know that's what I should do,
but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I simply have so much... free time. You can't expect me to just stay in bed.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I hate not having anything to do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to resume training as soon as possible, I
firmly put King Halo on temporary bed rest.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I don't want to get used to it, dummy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Still, I know in my head that I have no choice but
to accept my blunder.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I simply need to focus on sorting through these
unfamiliar feelings and heal up...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Grrrgh! But why do I still feel so frustrated?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Fussing about things that can't be changed is a
waste of time! Pull yourself together, King!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although King Halo says she needs to accept her
mistakes, it appears to be easier said than done.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But still, this could also be a good opportunity.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's simply one of the hurdles that first-rate
Umamusume must overcome.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This experience serves to make me stronger. The
unknown may be frightening, but once I know it,
it will become common place.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer. We'll overcome every obstacle
in our way!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Every one brings me that much closer to victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what difficulties cause her to stumble,
King Halo will always strive to stand back up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This injury will only serve to make her even
stronger.
